title: Add AI MIDI GENERATOR to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Text to tracks
gist.blurb: Someone built a tool that turns text into multitrack MIDI files. Just type what you want to hear, and out comes the sheet music for your synth.
gist.summary: Added the AI MIDI GENERATOR to the community showcase, enabling text-to-MIDI generation in the browser.
gist.impact: Producers and game developers can now generate multitrack MIDI files directly from plain-language prompts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing tiny studio headphones, hovering over a retro MIDI keyboard or synthesizer. Pixelated musical notes and MIDI piano roll blocks floating in the air.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny studio headphones, hovering over a retro MIDI synthesizer keyboard. Colorful pixelated musical notes and chunky MIDI piano roll blocks float up from the keys. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny studio headphones, hovering over a retro MIDI synthesizer keyboard.
